title: Midnight Menaces
description: Adds 7 new events to Mysterious Midnights! From nights with merging Slimes to scary Illusioners.
body: # Mysterious Midnights by Gamemode 4 Full moons gain a element of surprise with random events. ### Features - Every full moon, there is a chance of a random event bing triggered. - When triggered, all players will hear a wolf howl sound. - This adds 6 more events to the base data pack called [Mysterious Midnights](https://modrinth.com/datapack/9skST20d) Read more about all the options on the [Wiki](https://wiki.gm4.co/Mysterious_Midnights/Midnight_Menaces). ### More Info [ **Read the Wiki**](https://wiki.gm4.co/wiki/Mysterious_Midnights/Midnight_Menaces) ### Credits - Creator: [BPR](https://bsky.app/profile/bpr02.com) - Icon Design: [BPR](https://bsky.app/profile/bpr02.com) --- ## About Gamemode 4 Gamemode 4 is a series of command-powered creations that are designed to change and enhance the survival experience. All of our modules are designed to work together flawlessly, and are balanced for usage in a survival setting. Pick and choose your favorites from our [website](https://gm4.co), or wherever you get datapacks.
